description_long: This is a modern high-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The facade is primarily clad in light gray and white materials, with darker gray accents around the upper floors and window frames. The building features a regular grid of windows, with some sections having slightly recessed balconies that add depth to the exterior. The lower level appears to have a different treatment, possibly for commercial or lobby use, indicated by a continuous band of darker material. The uppermost floor has a distinct design with larger windows and a setback, creating a penthouse-like appearance. The overall structure is symmetrical, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, reflecting contemporary urban architectural trends.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with a light gray facade, regular windows, and recessed balconies. The design is clean, symmetrical, and features a flat roof with a distinct upper floor.
description_view_0: This view shows the front facade with a prominent grid of windows, recessed balconies, and a darker accent section at the top right.
description_view_1: The left side of the building is visible, showing the continuation of the window grid and the setback of the upper floor, with fewer balconies.
description_view_2: The rear facade is shown, featuring a similar window arrangement but with less pronounced balcony recesses and a central entrance at the base.
description_view_3: The right side of the building is visible, highlighting the upper floor's larger windows and the consistent window pattern along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical grid pattern across all facades, with consistent spacing and alignment. Some sections feature grouped windows with recessed balconies, while others maintain a uniform single-window layout.
